source_name: AEMO Integrated System Plan - transmission build-out progress

fields.scope: AEMO Integrated System Plan is the 30-year electricity blueprint published every two years. Identifies 'actionable' transmission projects required for the optimal pathway.
fields.primary_source_document: AEMO, Integrated System Plan (biennial); state Renewable Energy Zone declarations from NSW, VIC, QLD, SA energy ministers.
fields.keying_plan: Key the count of actionable ISP projects, km of transmission committed/under construction, and REZ count. This is the central forward-looking electricity-infrastructure indicator.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed ISP project counts and km committed. Major actionable projects include EnergyConnect (NSW-SA), HumeLink (NSW), VNI West (VIC-NSW), Marinus Link (TAS-VIC), Western Renewables Link (VIC), CopperString 2032 (QLD). Schedule slippage on these is a primary risk to the renewable transition.
